title: AlphaForgeLabel
description: Training label row produced by AlphaForge from simulation outputs. Contains classification label, gross/net R returns, cost decomposition, path quality metrics, NO_TRADE quality assessment, ambiguity markers, and provenance. Owned by AlphaForge; consumes SimulationOutput via contracts/mappings/simulation_to_alphaforge.json.

simulation_family_version.description: Version of simulation engine that produced these labels.

label_interpretation_version.description: Version of the label interpretation family.

simulation_profile_id.description: SimulationProfile identifier used to generate this label.

cost_model_version.description: Version of the cost model used. Links to simulation/docs/cost_model.md.

long_R_gross.description: Gross R for LONG_NOW action (before fees + slippage). From SimulationOutput.long_outcome.realized_r_gross.

long_R_net.description: Net R for LONG_NOW action (after fees + slippage). From SimulationOutput.long_outcome.realized_r_net.

short_R_gross.description: Gross R for SHORT_NOW action (before fees + slippage). From SimulationOutput.short_outcome.realized_r_gross.

short_R_net.description: Net R for SHORT_NOW action (after fees + slippage). From SimulationOutput.short_outcome.realized_r_net.

long_fee_cost_r.description: Fee cost impact on LONG in R terms. From SimulationOutput.long_outcome.fee_cost_r.

long_slippage_cost_r.description: Slippage cost impact on LONG in R terms. From SimulationOutput.long_outcome.slippage_cost_r.

long_total_cost_r.description: Total cost impact on LONG in R terms (fee + slippage). From SimulationOutput.long_outcome.total_cost_r.

short_fee_cost_r.description: Fee cost impact on SHORT in R terms. From SimulationOutput.short_outcome.fee_cost_r.

short_slippage_cost_r.description: Slippage cost impact on SHORT in R terms. From SimulationOutput.short_outcome.slippage_cost_r.

short_total_cost_r.description: Total cost impact on SHORT in R terms (fee + slippage). From SimulationOutput.short_outcome.total_cost_r.

best_action_label.description: Classification label: the best comparative action per simulation truth.

label_validity.description: Derived from resolution_status in simulation output. COMPLETE = valid training label; UNRESOLVED = ambiguous, exclude from training; INVALIDATED = data/simulation error, exclude.

no_trade_quality.description: Quality classification of the NO_TRADE outcome. From SimulationOutput.no_trade_outcome.no_trade_quality.

saved_loss_r.description: Loss avoided by not trading, in R terms. From SimulationOutput.no_trade_outcome.saved_loss_r.

missed_opportunity_r.description: Gain missed by not trading, in R terms. From SimulationOutput.no_trade_outcome.missed_opportunity_r.

was_correct_skip.description: True if NO_TRADE was the correct decision (best_action_label == NO_TRADE and it was profitable to skip). From SimulationOutput.no_trade_outcome.was_correct_skip.

best_action_after_cost.description: Best action after applying full cost model. May differ from best_action_label when costs consume gross edge. NO_TRADE becomes the answer when net edge is consumed by costs.

action_gap_R.description: Gap between best and second-best action in R terms (net, after costs).

regret_R.description: Regret relative to best action in R terms.

is_ambiguous.description: Whether action gap is below ambiguity margin. True means the decision was not clear; label may still be valid if gap direction was consistent.

long_mae_R.description: Maximum adverse excursion in R terms for LONG_NOW.

short_mae_R.description: Maximum adverse excursion in R terms for SHORT_NOW.

long_mfe_R.description: Maximum favourable excursion in R terms for LONG_NOW.

short_mfe_R.description: Maximum favourable excursion in R terms for SHORT_NOW.

path_quality_score.description: Path quality score for the best action (0-1).

funding_status.description: Funding cost status. DEFERRED until simulation funding model is implemented. Labels with DEFERRED funding are valid for SPOT-equivalent analysis only; perpetual/live trading claims are blocked.

cost_edge_warning.description: True when gross edge exists (R_gross > 0) but net edge is consumed by costs (R_net <= 0). Must be flagged in label dataset.
